operations.title: Primary Operations Center
operations.summary: 24-hour operational monitoring, incident triage, and protocol-aligned runbooks for core services.

operations.title: Regional Operations Desk
operations.summary: Regional coordination, citizen-facing issue routing, and escalation pathways for infrastructure incidents.

operations.title: Incident Review Board
operations.summary: Blameless review board, publication policy, and follow-up action tracking for major operational events.

infrastructure.title: Edge Service Network
infrastructure.summary: Regional gateway infrastructure for low-latency access to registry, engage, and passport services.

infrastructure.title: Primary Storage Grid
infrastructure.summary: Redundant object storage for public records, archives, and proof bundles with integrity verification.

infrastructure.title: Observability Pipeline
infrastructure.summary: Metrics, logs, and tracing streams for engineering, ops, and governance review workflows.

emerging.title: Formal Verification Pipeline
emerging.summary: Model-checking pipeline for protocol modules, smart-style rule bundles, and upgrade candidates.

emerging.title: Agentic Workflow Layer
emerging.summary: Verified workflow agents for onboarding, appeals, and outreach with human-in-the-loop guardrails.

emerging.title: Zero-Knowledge Access Layer
emerging.summary: Privacy-preserving access controls for sensitive records while preserving verifiable audit trails.
